title: senecio pavonii
intro: Senecio pavonii, also known as the Cineraria, is a flowering plant species native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its alkaloid content, particularly senecionine and senkirkine. The health benefits of Senecio pavonii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
